strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No advanced degree or formal AI/ML research background
Limited demonstrated AI product or platform leadership at scale
Minimal cloud-platform strategy or director-level IC experience advising strategic customers
response.justification: The candidate brings broad, hands-on engineering experience spanning full-stack, embedded, and high-performance systems, with recent involvement in AI-agent tooling and a long-running open-source platform that signals entrepreneurial drive. However, the resume shows limited evidence of director-level individual contributor work, deep AI/ML expertise, or strategic advisory experience with cloud and AI platforms at the scale implied by this Principal Engineer role.
